g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a homeowner searches on Google?')
sendPrompt('How does the LSA ad appear and what does it show?')
sendPrompt('What does the homeowner see when they click the LSA ad?')
sendPrompt('What must a high-converting HVAC landing page include?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a homeowner calls from the landing page?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a homeowner submits the lead form?')
sendPrompt('How does the system handle an inbound call via CallRail?')
sendPrompt('How does the form submission get saved to Supabase?')
sendPrompt('What triggers when a new lead is created in the system?')
sendPrompt('What automations fire immediately when a lead is created?')
sendPrompt('How does the HVAC owner get notified of new leads?')
sendPrompt('What does the HVAC owner see in the dashboard for a new lead?')
sendPrompt('How does the HVAC owner update lead status in the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('How does a status update from the dashboard get saved?')
sendPrompt('What triggers the review request automation?')
sendPrompt('What does the automated review request message look like?')
sendPrompt('What does the homeowner do with the review request?')

svg.text: Missed call branch: CallRail webhook → FastAPI → GHL triggers text-back SMS within 2 min
"We missed your call — reply YES to book or we'll call back in 30 min"
